questions.questionText: 梅雨入りかと思うと<u>憂鬱</u>だ。
questions.explanation: 憂鬱 is read as ゆううつ, meaning melancholy or depression.

questions.questionText: 借金返済の<u>催促状</u>が来た。
questions.explanation: 催促状 is read as さいそくじょう, meaning a demand letter or reminder.

questions.questionText: その件については、早期解決に向けて、___対応が重要だ。
questions.explanation: 速やかな (すみやかな) means prompt or rapid, fitting the context of resolving the matter early.

questions.questionText: 家が狭くて衣類の___に困っている。
questions.explanation: 収納 (しゅうのう) refers to storage or putting things away, commonly used for clothes. 収容 is for accommodating people/things in a facility.
汗まみれ means covered in sweat. まみれ is used for liquids or dirt covering a surface.

questions.questionText: 修理できないなら、新しいのを買う___。
questions.explanation: 〜までのことだ means 'there is no choice but to...'. If it can't be fixed, you just have to buy a new one.
